title: Sandwīp Heat Wave
lead: Sandwīp is experiencing a critical heat wave with a Z-Score of +3.29. The city has reached a Score of 10.0/10, indicating extreme conditions.
body:
The current heat wave in Sandwīp has led to a significant increase in Cooling Degree Days (CDD), with a value of 10.5 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 81%, which is further exacerbating the heat. 
 The wind speed is moderate, at 20.4 km/h, but is not providing sufficient relief from the heat.
conclusion: Activate emergency heat wave protocols immediately.
